TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Cirakesay, title = Cirakesay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cirakesay} }

S.FORM: alang Cirakesay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 58 buwan, 124 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 82% kyan ku 102 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 18% kyan ku 22 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 77%, Tayan 1%, Bunun 3%, Setik 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cirakesay hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Cirakesay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cirakesay hya' ga Chishang. tay mkraya' na Cirakesay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cirakesay hya' ga Ancoh. tay mkyahu' na Cirakesay hya' ga Monating. tay 'llaw na Cirakesay hya' ga Pacuya. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Cirakesay ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Cirakesay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 58 buwan, 124 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 82% kyan ku 102 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 18% kyan ku 22 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 77%, Tayan 1%, Bunun 3%, Setik 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cirakesay hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Cirakesay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cirakesay hya' ga Chishang. tay mkraya' na Cirakesay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cirakesay hya' ga Ancoh. tay mkyahu' na Cirakesay hya' ga Monating. tay 'llaw na Cirakesay hya' ga Pacuya. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Cirakesay ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč ¶~ ®irakes~…ēaj …£a nija mki s~…ēku kariŇč keŇč atu zos~…ēi …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē **%, tajan *%, ő≤unun *%, s~…ēetik *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran, Ňčas~…ēal ps~…ēatu te…£ami ru pqniqan iju. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na ¶~ ®irakes~…ēaj ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax. taj Ēzil na ¶~ ®irakes~…ēaj ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na ¶~ ®irakes~…ēaj ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®ńßis~…ēńßaŇč. taj mkraja Ē na ¶~ ®irakes~…ēaj ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na ¶~ ®irakes~…ēaj ńßja Ē …£a an ¶~ ®ońß. taj mkjańßu Ē na ¶~ ®irakes~…ēaj ńßja Ē …£a monatiŇč. taj Ēllaw na ¶~ ®irakes~…ēaj ńßja Ē …£a pa ¶~ ®uja. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan qalaŇč ¶~ ®irakes~…ēaj …£a uŇčat pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
